titleStmt.title: SII 24.568: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 568.

summary.p: Records that a pair of gold anklets with tinkling bells (gejjalu) is the offerings of Peda-Veṅkaṭa-perumāḷ-nāyanivāru, son of Lakshmīdēvammavāru, the queen (paṭṭamahishī) of Tupākuḷa Rāmaliṅgayya-nāyanivāru. The weight of the set is given as 468(1/2) varāha. Below this is engraved a later record stating that the anklets were re-made with an additional gold of the weight of 40 rupees by the munificence of Javīra Bāyi Bhagavaṁdās (Bhagavāndās), mother of G.B. Narōttamdās of Bombay, in the month of September 1929, and that the weight of the jewel after remaking is 183 tolas. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1656, Ānanda, Māgha śu. 5, Friday correspond to 1735, A.D., January 17, f.d.t. ·23. The nakshatra (not quoted) was Uttarabhādrapada, f.d.n. ·03.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śālivāhana śakābdaṁbulu 1656 Agunēṭi Ānaṁdanāma saṁvatsaraṁ mākha śuddha 5 śukravāraṁ Ī śubhadinamaṁdu
śrīvāriyaperumāḷu pādamulayaṁdu tupākula rāmaliṁgayyanāyunivāri paṭṭamahiṣulaina
lakṣmīdēvammavāri komāruḍu peddaveṁkaṭaperumāḷa nāyanigāru baṁgāru Aṁddelu gejjelu samarpiṁci sadāśē
va jōḍu 1ki yeḍa 468 vara . 6

1929 saṁvastaraṁ seppeṁbarnelalō baṁbāyi śrī ji ji narōttaṁdāsugāru talligāraina bāyi javīrabāyi bhagavaṁdāsuvāri
sahaiyamuvalla nalabhai rūpāyilu tūnika baṁgārucērci yī jatagejjelanu kottagā cēyiṁcca
ḍamainadi kottagācēyiṁccina venaka tūnika 183 tola baṁgāru 1929
Digital edition of SII 24.568 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
